entity.label: Aner
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A city of Manasseh given to the Levites of Kohath’s family (1 Chr. 6:70).

nodes.label: Aner
nodes.description: A city of Manasseh given to the Levites of Kohath’s family (1 Chr. 6:70).

verses.text: And out of the half tribe of Manasseh; Aner with her suburbs, and Bileam with her suburbs, for the family of the remnant of the sons of Kohath.
